title: BloxFox Client
description: Quilt pack boosting your FPS while adding some QoL features to it!
body:
BloxFox makes your experience **a way** better by using **optimization mods**, adding **features from OptiFine** and some extras like downloading resource packs from Vanilla Tweaks, **adding controller, heck, EVEN VR support!**

🚀 Launch your FPS to the moon!
-
Everybody in the FPS community knows Optifine, maybe Sodium, Phosphor. We said **goodbye** to the mods (except Sodium, eh...)! We use completely **new lightning engine** which is **WAY faster** than Phosphor and vanilla engine combined! RAM is also very important, so we made sure it **doesn't take as much RAM** as it should. Yeah, and your game launches at the **speed of light.***

🎮 Better than Bedrock edition!
-
Yes, we may not support Switch, Xbox and lot of those consoles, but with **BloxFox** you can **imitate this feeling** by plugging your controller in your PC. Yes, we **support controllers**. Not only that, **VR players** are also welcome!

🔎 Optifine 2.0
-
I think we all remember **Optifine.** But it has a one, **BIG** disadvantage. It's one mod, thus all of those features are enabled and **cannot be disabled**, so it partially slows your game. But in **BloxFox** you can disable certain **features that you don't like**** and even if you have all of it enabled, you can get a **TON** of FPS.

➕ Everyone likes extra things!
-
It's not just performance modpack, it's a client, it has **TON of useful tweaks.** Literally, tweaks. You can **download resource packs from vanilla tweaks.** Also to be realistic (if you **accidentally** play on VR) we added a **new sound physics!** Are you sailor looking for treasure, but you **NEED** to look at that map? **No more stopping,** No more problems! Now you can just **sail and look**, and look and sail, and sail...

❓ Any questions?
-
Feel free to ask me anything on **my Discord server!** Did you find a bug? You can report it on the **issues Github page.** **All of those links are in the sidebar.**

*= Your game doesn't launch at the speed of light. It's just advertising, that's how the world works.                       
**= Only if you use Prism Launcher or MultiMC, disabling in Vanilla launcher is not supported.
